textByHash.3779c7a9bf54f83d1e0cf6425c98c644eb4ec7a4: And now be away, but forget not the task that Safalaan set you! For why else would you be here?
textByHash.a8782ed6e96c8a4e19671e2e2d85db2300722829: As a gesture for my intervening on your behalf, I'd take it as a kindness if you would deliver a message to him.
textByHash.afb5b64735a3eb93320526a71fd5cbf37956adf5: Awaken! There are things for you to know.
textByHash.b634109160357cf31bd43c61a2f45375dc8d29ea: The message you will find secreted behind tiles where smoke is carried away from the depiction of statuesque evil.
textByHash.c0f81a93912618c5d421ade373493e56904d5089: Sorry for the interruption, Lord Vanstrom, but Lady Vanescula 'requests' that this individual be questioned before being used as a punch bag.
textByHash.c7c177f3e31a0ab0093aceda7b9952023f3d13dd: Forgive me for the interruption, but Lady Vanescula has urgent need of you.
textByHash.cc458918ff64977b29d637917744da24222edd2a: Your life may be forfeit but for now you live. My mistress will understand my motives. She has an interest in the one called Safalaan.
